data.title: US Stocks Fall On Fears Of Escalation Of War In Middle East
data.description:
Catenaa, Friday, June 13, 2025- US stocks fell on Friday as Israel’s attack on Iran’s nuclear facilities shook global markets, leading oil prices and gold prices to spike amidst uncertainty. The Dow Jones Industrial Average tumbled roughly 1. 4%, the S&P 500 dropped 0. 9%, while the Nasdaq Composite fell by 0. 9%, as investors withdrew from riskier […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/us-stocks-fall-on-fears-of-escalation-of-war-in-middle-east

data.title: Crypto market maker Gotbit and founder sentenced for fraud, manipulation
data.description:

source: https://cryptoslate.com/crypto-market-maker-gotbit-and-founder-sentenced-for-fraud-manipulation/

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Drops Below 105,000 USDT with a 3.24% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jun 13, 2025, 17:48 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 105,000 USDT and is now trading at 104,908.460938 USDT, with a narrowed 3.24% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Breaking: Invesco Galaxy Registers Solana ETF Amid 90% Odds of Approval
data.description:
Invesco and Galaxy on Friday said it has officially registered for Solana ETF in Delaware. The move comes as the U. S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) asked the issuers to file updated Form S-1, hinting at approval likely by the end of the year
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/13/breaking-invesco-galaxy-registers-solana-etf-amid-90-odds-of-approval/
